meaning: adj.痴情的,多愁善感的,笨的,愚蠢的n.痴情的人,轻佻的情人,笨瓜,傻子
examples: I will never imitate spoony birds.
I will never learn from the spoony birds.
So spoony earth waited for rose until winter.
As regards getting golf exposed to wider community, Spoony believes he has the solution.
Runners were helped over the line by people including former Spice Girl Mel C, DJ Spoony and Steve Rotheram MP.
